productDisplayName: American Tourister Unisex Grey Laptop Bag
description: american tourister is a brand from samsonite Corporation, which has been in existence since 1933. It is a one stop shop for all your travelling bags, sling bags and back packs. At American Tourister we are proud to make durable and stylish bags to suit any occasion. Height: 30 cmWidth: 41 cmDepth: 8 cmWarranty: 18 monthsMade of polyester for durabilityTwo main zipped compartments with a adjustable laptop sleeve and velcro closure Two zipped pockets for enhanced spaceOne zipped side pocket on the front with organizer sleeves and pen holdersOne smaller zipped pocket in the frontOne compartment at the back with a velcro closure on the top and a zipped bottom Two short padded handles for carrying easeOne long adjustable and removable strapBranded zips and branding on the frontBranding in the form of legs at the baseCareClean with a damp cloth when necessary
